name: ADTRAN Holdings, Inc.
description: ADTRAN Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides networking and communications platforms, software, systems, and services for voice, data, video, and internet communications in the United States and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Network Solutions and Services & Support. It offers fiber access, copper access, and optical transport solutions, as well as subscriber devices, cloud-based management software, and professional services to service providers, enterprises, and government customers.
